events.description: motion-nominated (net sweep +0.140 of width) / The ego vehicle moves from the right lane to the left lane on a two-lane highway during sunset. / The ego-vehicle moves from the right lane to the left lane to overtake a silver van.

motion-nominated (net sweep +0.102 of width) / The ego-vehicle moves into the left lane to pass a slower white pickup truck. / The ego vehicle moves into the left lane to overtake a white pickup truck.

The ego-vehicle moves one lane to the left to pass a slower-moving white SUV. / The ego vehicle changes into the adjacent left lane, which is clear of other traffic. / The ego vehicle drifts left from the second lane into the leftmost lane on the highway. / The ego-vehicle moves one lane to the left on a multi-lane highway. / motion-nominated (net sweep +0.111 of width)

motion-nominated (net sweep -0.141 of width) / The ego-vehicle performs a double lane change to the right across two lanes. / The ego-vehicle moves into the lane to its right on a multi-lane highway at sunset.
The ego-vehicle moves into the left lane to pass slower vehicles ahead. / motion-nominated (net sweep +0.162 of width)

motion-nominated (net sweep +0.102 of width) / The ego-vehicle moves into the left lane to pass a slower white pickup truck. / The ego vehicle moves into the left lane to overtake a white pickup truck.
